raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "self-affirmation and behavioral commitment to boundary-setting and disengagement",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "energetic boundaries exist and can be maintained without external justification",
    "incoherence in situations or relationships can be reliably detected and warrants non-engagement",
    "guilt is unnecessary or counterproductive when withdrawing",
    "a simple 'no' carries sufficient weight and requires no elaboration",
    "withdrawal preserves personal integrity without relational cost"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent; all clauses reinforce non-explanatory disengagement and self-authorization",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the speaker faces recurring boundary violations or energy-draining interactions where clear disengagement improves well-being and the affirmation supports consistent follow-through",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the speaker uses the framing to avoid necessary accountability, mislabels neutral situations as incoherent, or equates silence with resolution when direct communication would be more constructive"
}
